accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all figures and provisions match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as DHS border/immigration appropriations for FY2026.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes 287(g) agreements and qualified cooperating jurisdiction conditions tied to existing statutes.

exceptions_conditions.why: Captures key restrictions including the processing coordinator deadline, surveillance tower limits, $350M floor, and tribal exclusion.

effective_dates.why: Notes funds available through September 30, 2029, and the October 31, 2028 restriction.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major appropriations and operative restrictions across both titles.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, descriptive language with no editorializing.

concise.why: Compact with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: CBP, ICE, HSI, DHS, and statutory references are correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: All dollar amounts and dates match the bill text.
